trivia_bullets.text: Gearbane Orangutan is a red 2/2 Ape with Reach — a thematic choice for Ravnica where the setting's Gruul Clans and natural creatures push back against guild-controlled urbanization. Thopters, the artifact drones smashed in the art, are an Izzet-associated construct type [Scryfall].

Flavor text: "In her defense, thopters are very fun to smash." — Udol of the Foundway Associates [Scryfall]. The Foundway Associates appear across multiple MKM flavor texts as an investigative group tangential to the main R.A.M.I. case; Udol's wry defense of the orangutan implies the destruction was witnessed mid-investigation [WebSearch: Scryfall card page, WebSearch snippet].

The ETB modal lets the controller destroy an artifact or sacrifice one for two +1/+1 counters — making it both a Naturalize stapled to a body and a self-sacrifice outlet. EDHREC rank 9577 (the highest uptake of any card in this batch), appearing in 9,914 decks with 67% inclusion in Kibo, Uktabi Prince artifact-focused Commander builds [EDHREC via WebSearch].
Previewed by Wizards via a TikTok video on 2024-01-17, per Scryfall preview data. Artist Svetlin Velinov is a Bulgarian illustrator with a long portfolio of Magic creature art [Scryfall].
